description_long: This is a sleek, modern business jet with a streamlined white fuselage, featuring a pointed nose and a row of dark-tinted passenger windows along each side. The aircraft has two rear-mounted turbofan engines, positioned on either side of the tail section, and a T-tail configuration with a prominent horizontal stabilizer atop the vertical fin. The wings are low-mounted with a noticeable sweep and slight upward dihedral, and the wingtips are squared off without visible winglets. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with the nose gear extended and visible beneath the cockpit area. Subtle blue and gray striping accents the fuselage, and there are visible logos and text on the tail and near the rear windows.
description: A modern white business jet with swept low wings, rear-mounted twin engines, and a T-tail, featuring dark windows and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, passenger windows, open entry door, and detailed tail markings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin rear-mounted engines, T-tail, and the full wingspan with slight dihedral.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the passenger windows, closed entry door, and tail logo, with clear view of the wing sweep.
description_view_3: Front view emphasizing the pointed nose, cockpit windows, low-mounted swept wings, and visible nose landing gear.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with moderately swept wings and slight upward dihedral; squared wingtips without visible winglets.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with visible nose gear and main gear units.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and dark-tinted windows.
